nasb.text: For the shepherds have become stupid And have not sought the Lord; Therefore they have not prospered, And all their flock is scattered.

esv.text: For the shepherds are stupid and do not inquire of the Lord; therefore they have not prospered, and all their flock is scattered.

cnv.text: 牧人都是頑梗的， 他們不求問耶和華； 因此，他們不得亨通， 他們所有的羊群都四散。

ccb.text: 首领愚昧， 没有求问耶和华， 因此一败涂地， 百姓如羊群四散。
